title: The Unhinged One
description: Just a mod that adds a funny horror creature.
body:
_Something is out there._

It doesn't sleep. It doesn't stop. And every so often, when you least expect it, you'll hear something behind you.

A rare and deeply unsettling creature that roams the overworld at night, communicates with you personally via chat, and has a concerning habit of disguising itself as a prop.

It will find you. 
It's just a matter of **when**.

This mod adds 3 new mobs to the game. The Shadow, the Leechoraptor, and The Unhinged One...
This also adds a new pocket dimension as the Unhinged Ones home, with 6 biomes, The Bone Fields, The Charred Forest, The Crimson Depths, The Shattered Peaks, and The Wastes of Despair.
